# Jaison Herbals — Natural Ayurvedic Skincare

> Jaison Herbals makes 100% natural Ayurvedic herbal powders for skin and hair care, handcrafted in Nashik, India. No chemicals, no fillers — just single-ingredient herbal powders rooted in ancient Indian tradition.

## Products

- Ubtan Powder — traditional face & body brightening blend (turmeric, sandalwood, gram flour)
- Amla Powder — Vitamin C-rich Indian gooseberry for hair growth and scalp health
- Neem Powder — antibacterial, anti-acne face cleanser
- Multani Mitti — oil-control and pore-tightening face pack (Fuller's Earth)
- Shikakai Powder — natural hair cleanser and detangler
- Reetha Powder — soapnut hair wash, chemical-free lather
- Orange Peel Powder — brightening, antioxidant-rich face mask ingredient
- Mehendi Powder — pure henna for natural hair colouring
- Nagarmotha Powder — Ayurvedic skin-balancing herb for oily skin
- Combo Kits — curated hair care and skin care ritual sets (Hair Care Trio, Premium Hair Care, Scalp Care, Head-to-Toe Ritual Kit)

## Brand Principles

- Single-ingredient: every product is one herb, nothing added
- Sourced in India: herbs procured directly from Indian farmers
- Chemical-free: no preservatives, no artificial fragrance, no fillers
- Ayurvedic lineage: formulas rooted in classical Ayurvedic texts
